creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hm.  When trying to reach www.bsdcongo.org I get: 


% ping www.bsdcongo.org 
PING www.bsdcongo.org (62.193.225.156): 56 data bytes 
^C 
--- www.bsdcongo.org ping statistics --- 
104 packets transmitted, 0 packets received, 100.0% packet loss 
%  

Either the system is done or it does not exist anymore. 
Feedback from original sender of the PR is needed. 

Additionally set a timeout of 1 month.
